svg.text: Dual clicky pen - proposed for treble strings where nat/sharp pitch points collide
Rendered-view elevation, 1:1 mm. Side installed in the neck plywood.
Shared flange hosts two independent clicky stacks. Shafts converge inside the flange from 16 mm barrel spacing down to 3.4 mm at the paddle tips.
independent click per pitch; OD 10 mm each
two translucent barrels, OD 12 mm each
quad-lobed: 4 x M2.5 screws into plywood
each tangent to string; nose r 0.8
Footprint: 48 mm along string (incl. screw ears) x 14 mm across.
Fits within the 17 mm treble string pitch in the cross-string direction; along-string length uses unused space between adjacent strings.
